titles.title: Lord I've Come To Bless Your Holy Name

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I could ask You for a miracle You Know I stand in need I could seek your hand To move and touch my family But I've put aside this Temporary trials that I've faced Lord I just want to bless You with my praise

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord I've come to bless Your Holy name again Just once more before I say amen You're my Jesus, My Redeemer, My Savior and my Friend Lord I've to come to bless Your holy name

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I could never count how many ways You've made my life complete Lord Your mercy is the reason Why my spirit sings Though my words could never Fully tell the story of Your grace I just love to rest in your embrace
